title: Accept or Reject
description:
Work as a moderator in a growing dating app company.

Review batches of user profiles, identify suspicious accounts, and decide who gets approved. Some users are genuine, some are scammers, and some are simply absurd.

But moderation is only the beginning.

As the days pass, you'll face workplace challenges, story-driven events, mini-games, and difficult decisions that will shape both your career and your future inside the company.

Most importantly, you'll have the chance to build a relationship with your strict and enigmatic boss.

Can you earn her trust and win her heart while becoming the company's perfect moderator?

Features• Review and moderate 200+ dating profiles

• Accept or reject users based on their descriptions

• Discover funny, suspicious, and unusual profiles

• Story-driven events with meaningful choices

• Romance route focused on your boss

• Multiple arcade-style mini-games

• Single-player Story Mode

• Local Multiplayer Mini-Game Mode

• Multiple endings to unlock

• Steam achievements

• Approximately 2–3 hours per playthrough

More Than Just ModerationEvery batch of profiles brings new challenges.

Meet unusual users, make difficult decisions, and improve your moderation skills while navigating life inside the office.

Your choices will influence your career, your relationships, and the outcome of the story.

A Workplace RomanceYour boss is professional, demanding, and difficult to read.

Over time, your decisions will determine whether your relationship remains strictly professional or develops into something more.

Will you earn her trust?

Or lose your chance before she ever notices how you feel?

Your Decisions MatterEvery choice can affect the story.

Every event can change a relationship.

Every playthrough can lead to a different ending.

Accept or Reject?

The choice is yours.
description_short: Review hundreds of funny, bizarre, and sometimes suspicious dating profiles, survive office politics, play mini-games, and build a workplace romance with your mysterious boss.
